name: Yokoi Ruka
description:
Yokoi Ruka (Non-Killing Game AU)

Ruka Yokoi (横よこ井い 瑠る佳か) is a student participating in the Session Two killing game featured in Tetro Danganronpa: BLUE. Her title is the Ultimate Spelling Bee Champion. Within the session, she is designated as Student Seven.
creator: Kotonoha Kagayaki
